$comment Csum: 1 5f4c71699db24468 $end


$scope module soc_system_top $end
$var reg 1024 ! autoflow_wave_file [1023:0] $end
$var wire 1 " clk $end
$var wire 1 # rst_n $end
$var wire 32 $ s_axi_awaddr [31:0] $end
$var wire 3 % s_axi_awprot [2:0] $end
$var wire 8 & s_axi_awlen [7:0] $end
$var wire 3 ' s_axi_awsize [2:0] $end
$var wire 2 ( s_axi_awburst [1:0] $end
$var wire 1 ) s_axi_awvalid $end
$var wire 1 * s_axi_awready $end
$var wire 32 + s_axi_wdata [31:0] $end
$var wire 4 , s_axi_wstrb [3:0] $end
$var wire 1 - s_axi_wlast $end
$var wire 1 . s_axi_wvalid $end
$var wire 1 / s_axi_wready $end
$var wire 2 0 s_axi_bresp [1:0] $end
$var wire 1 1 s_axi_bvalid $end
$var wire 1 2 s_axi_bready $end
$var wire 32 3 s_axi_araddr [31:0] $end
$var wire 3 4 s_axi_arprot [2:0] $end
$var wire 8 5 s_axi_arlen [7:0] $end
$var wire 3 6 s_axi_arsize [2:0] $end
$var wire 2 7 s_axi_arburst [1:0] $end
$var wire 1 8 s_axi_arvalid $end
$var wire 1 9 s_axi_arready $end
$var wire 32 : s_axi_rdata [31:0] $end
$var wire 2 ; s_axi_rresp [1:0] $end
$var wire 1 < s_axi_rlast $end
$var wire 1 = s_axi_rvalid $end
$var wire 1 > s_axi_rready $end
$var wire 32 ? paddr [31:0] $end
$var wire 3 @ pprot [2:0] $end
$var wire 4 A psel [3:0] $end
$var wire 1 B penable $end
$var wire 1 C pwrite $end
$var wire 32 D pwdata [31:0] $end
$var wire 4 E pstrb [3:0] $end
$var wire 32 F prdata_0 [31:0] $end
$var wire 32 G prdata_1 [31:0] $end
$var wire 32 H prdata_2 [31:0] $end
$var wire 32 I prdata_3 [31:0] $end
$var wire 1 J pready_0 $end
$var wire 1 K pready_1 $end
$var wire 1 L pready_2 $end
$var wire 1 M pready_3 $end
$var wire 1 N pslverr_0 $end
$var wire 1 O pslverr_1 $end
$var wire 1 P pslverr_2 $end
$var wire 1 Q pslverr_3 $end
$var wire 32 R prdata [31:0] $end
$var wire 1 S pready $end
$var wire 1 T pslverr $end

$scope module u_bridge $end
$var wire 1 " clk $end
$var reg 1 U s_axi_bvalid $end
$var wire 1 2 s_axi_bready $end
$var reg 1 V s_axi_rvalid $end
$var wire 1 > s_axi_rready $end
$var reg 32 W paddr [31:0] $end
$var reg 4 X psel [3:0] $end
$var reg 1 Y penable $end
$var reg 1 Z pwrite $end
$var wire 1 S pready $end
$var wire 1 # rst_n $end
$var wire 32 $ s_axi_awaddr [31:0] $end
$var wire 3 % s_axi_awprot [2:0] $end
$var wire 8 & s_axi_awlen [7:0] $end
$var wire 3 ' s_axi_awsize [2:0] $end
$var wire 2 ( s_axi_awburst [1:0] $end
$var wire 1 ) s_axi_awvalid $end
$var reg 1 [ s_axi_awready $end
$var wire 32 + s_axi_wdata [31:0] $end
$var wire 4 , s_axi_wstrb [3:0] $end
$var wire 1 - s_axi_wlast $end
$var wire 1 . s_axi_wvalid $end
$var reg 1 \ s_axi_wready $end
$var reg 2 ] s_axi_bresp [1:0] $end
$var wire 32 3 s_axi_araddr [31:0] $end
$var wire 3 4 s_axi_arprot [2:0] $end
$var wire 8 5 s_axi_arlen [7:0] $end
$var wire 3 6 s_axi_arsize [2:0] $end
$var wire 2 7 s_axi_arburst [1:0] $end
$var wire 1 8 s_axi_arvalid $end
$var reg 1 ^ s_axi_arready $end
$var reg 32 _ s_axi_rdata [31:0] $end
$var reg 2 ` s_axi_rresp [1:0] $end
$var reg 1 a s_axi_rlast $end
$var reg 3 b pprot [2:0] $end
$var reg 32 c pwdata [31:0] $end
$var reg 4 d pstrb [3:0] $end
$var wire 32 R prdata [31:0] $end
$var wire 1 T pslverr $end
$var reg 4 e state [3:0] $end
$var reg 5 f timeout_cnt [4:0] $end
$var reg 8 g burst_len_reg [7:0] $end
$var reg 3 h burst_size_reg [2:0] $end
$var reg 2 i burst_type_reg [1:0] $end
$var reg 8 j burst_cnt [7:0] $end
$var reg 1 k err_latch $end
$var reg 4 l target_psel_reg [3:0] $end
$var wire 1 m awaddr_in_range $end
$var wire 1 n araddr_in_range $end
$var wire 4 o aw_device_sel [3:0] $end
$var wire 4 p ar_device_sel [3:0] $end

$scope task _$$txp_fail_action_unnamed$$_39 $end
$upscope $end


$scope task _$$txp_fail_action_unnamed$$_40 $end
$upscope $end

$upscope $end


$scope module u_sram_0 $end
$var wire 1 " PCLK $end
$var wire 1 # PRESETn $end
$var wire 1 q PSEL $end
$var wire 1 B PENABLE $end
$var wire 1 C PWRITE $end
$var wire 12 r PADDR [11:0] $end
$var wire 32 D PWDATA [31:0] $end
$var reg 32 s PRDATA [31:0] $end
$var wire 1 J PREADY $end
$var wire 1 N PSLVERR $end
$var wire 1 t apb_access $end
$var wire 1 u hit_pslverr_addr $end
$var wire 1 v hit_timeout_addr $end
$upscope $end


$scope module u_sram_1 $end
$var wire 1 " PCLK $end
$var wire 1 # PRESETn $end
$var wire 1 w PSEL $end
$var wire 1 B PENABLE $end
$var wire 1 C PWRITE $end
$var wire 12 r PADDR [11:0] $end
$var wire 32 D PWDATA [31:0] $end
$var reg 32 x PRDATA [31:0] $end
$var wire 1 K PREADY $end
$var wire 1 O PSLVERR $end
$var wire 1 y apb_access $end
$var wire 1 z hit_pslverr_addr $end
$var wire 1 { hit_timeout_addr $end
$upscope $end


$scope module u_sram_2 $end
$var wire 1 " PCLK $end
$var wire 1 # PRESETn $end
$var wire 1 | PSEL $end
$var wire 1 B PENABLE $end
$var wire 1 C PWRITE $end
$var wire 12 r PADDR [11:0] $end
$var wire 32 D PWDATA [31:0] $end
$var reg 32 } PRDATA [31:0] $end
$var wire 1 L PREADY $end
$var wire 1 P PSLVERR $end
$var wire 1 ~ apb_access $end
$var wire 1 "! hit_pslverr_addr $end
$var wire 1 "" hit_timeout_addr $end
$upscope $end


$scope module u_sram_3 $end
$var wire 1 " PCLK $end
$var wire 1 # PRESETn $end
$var wire 1 "# PSEL $end
$var wire 1 B PENABLE $end
$var wire 1 C PWRITE $end
$var wire 12 r PADDR [11:0] $end
$var wire 32 D PWDATA [31:0] $end
$var reg 32 "$ PRDATA [31:0] $end
$var wire 1 M PREADY $end
$var wire 1 Q PSLVERR $end
$var wire 1 "% apb_access $end
$var wire 1 "& hit_pslverr_addr $end
$var wire 1 "' hit_timeout_addr $end
$upscope $end

$upscope $end

$enddefinitions $end
